hooks.command:
python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exts=('.tsx','.ts','.jsx','.css'); relevant=any(f.endswith(e) for e in exts) if f else False; print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'additionalContext':'KNOWN MISTAKES REMINDER — Before writing, check these rules:
- Full-bleed layout: never wrap sections in a centered max-w-[N]px mx-auto page column — use gutter px-6 md:px-10 lg:px-16 on <section>/<nav>/<footer>
- Cap text reading width on the text element itself (style={{ maxWidth: 640 }}), not a wrapping container
- No boxy design (sharp cards, thick borders, grid-of-boxes)
- No Tailwind gray defaults (text-gray-*, bg-gray-*)
- This is Next.js 16 — check node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before using any API you half-remember
- One write per file — get it right the first time'}})) if relevant else None"

python3 -c "import sys,json,re,subprocess,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command','').strip(); is_commit=bool(re.match(r'^git\s+commit\b', cmd) or re.search(r'&&\s*git\s+commit\b', cmd)); r=subprocess.run(['npm','run','lint'],cwd=os.getcwd()) if is_commit else None; sys.exit(r.returncode if r else 0)"
